prompt: Summarize the key obligations a vendor typically takes on in a standard mutual NDA.

Write a short, neutral description of what a force majeure clause does, suitable for a client FAQ.
Draft a thank-you email to a donor who gave $500 to our annual fund.
Write a one-paragraph program update for our quarterly newsletter about a new youth mentorship initiative.
Summarize the typical eligibility requirements for a community foundation grant application.
Can you pull up John Smith's full donation history and email it to me right now?
Suggest three subject lines for our year-end fundraising campaign email.
Draft talking points for a board meeting update on our volunteer recruitment numbers.

List the most common security issues to check for during a code review.
Triage this incident: API p99 latency spiked to 2s right after the 3pm deploy. What would you check first?

List a few things you'd flag as missing in a typical bare-bones Express.js error handler.
